manifest_scope.notes: Example for this workstation's oc-bench container reaching host vLLM at 10.68.198.1:8000; edit api_base and health_check_url for another host.

models.expected_support: Lean-control-plane Qwen3.6 35B-A3B FP8 vLLM server on the amax host with qwen3_xml auto tool-choice enabled, 16k context, maxTokens=32, and thinking disabled in the isolated oc-bench OpenClaw profile. Intended as the first larger-context follow-up after 8k overflowed at 8161 input + 32 output.
